members.name: Primanti Brothers
members.description: Pittsburgh's legendary sandwich shop piling coleslaw and fries right on the sandwich since the Strip District days.

members.name: Phipps Conservatory
members.tagline: A garden oasis in the heart of the city
members.description: World-class botanical garden and greenhouse in Oakland, featuring seasonal flower shows and sustainability exhibits.

members.name: Pittsburgh Public Market
members.tagline: Fresh, local, and always in season
members.description: Year-round indoor farmers market in the Strip District featuring local vendors, artisans, and fresh produce.

members.name: UPMC Health System
members.description: One of the nation's leading healthcare systems and Pittsburgh's largest employer, based in Oakland.

members.name: The Andy Warhol Museum
members.tagline: The most comprehensive single-artist museum in the world
members.description: Seven floors celebrating the life and work of Pittsburgh's most famous son, located on the North Shore.

members.name: Klavon's Ice Cream Parlor
members.description: Beloved Strip District soda fountain serving hand-dipped ice cream in a beautifully preserved vintage parlor.

members.name: Pittsburgh Technology Council
members.description: Nonprofit supporting tech businesses, startups, and entrepreneurs across the greater Pittsburgh region.

members.name: Station Square
members.tagline: Where the city meets the river
members.description: Riverfront entertainment complex on the South Shore featuring dining, shopping, and stunning views of downtown.
